title: Section 13A
content: 1 2[13A. Salaries of the Judges.(1) There shall be paid to the Chief Justice of a High Court, by way of salary, 3[ 4[two lakh fifty thousand rupees per mensem] ]. (2) There shall be paid to a Judge of a High Court, by way of salary, 5[ 6[two lakh twenty-five thousand rupees per mensem].]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of 1998, s. 4, for "pension" (w.e.f. 1-1-1996). 2. Ins. by s. 4, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-1-1996). 3. Subs. by Act 23 of 2009, s. 2, for "thirty thousand rupees per mensem" (w.e.f. 1-1-2006). 4. Subs. by Act 10 of 2018, s. 2, for "ninety thousand rupees per mensem" (w.e.f. 1-1-2016). 5. Subs. by Act 23 of 2009, s. 2, for "twenty-six thousand rupees per mensem" (w.e.f. 1-1-2006). 6. Subs. by Act 10 of 2018, s. 2, for "eighty thousand rupees per mensem" (w.e.f. 1-1-2016).
